description: IEmailService interface and Resend implementation for sending emails
steps: Define IEmailService interface in Fexora.Core/Interfaces with SendAsync method
Create ResendEmailService in Fexora.Infrastructure/Services implementing IEmailService
Add Resend API key to appsettings and .env.example

description: Password reset API endpoints with secure token flow
steps: Add POST /auth/password-reset endpoint (request reset by email)
Add POST /auth/password-reset/confirm endpoint (set new password with token)
Token is single-use, expires after 1 hour
No information leak: always return 200 regardless of email existence
Rate limit: max 3 requests per hour per email

description: Password reset UI pages in web app
steps: Create [locale]/(auth)/reset-password/page.tsx with token from URL and new password form
